root.sql: SELECT (row_number() over ())::text , data_balance , data_monthly , confirm_date , membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( membership_no ) as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem( membership_no ) as member_group FROM ( SELECT sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_monthly , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , current_date FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_cls_confirm_data WHERE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no AND sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_share_mem.drop_status = '0' AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' AND sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' --AND sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '20/07/2023' /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance DESC ) tab LIMIT 10
